items.hook: Happy to help you narrow this down.
items.bridge: For a beauty appointment, the concern, time window, and branch matter more than a quick yes or no.
items.next_step: Ask what concern the user wants to solve, when they want to come, and which branch or area is convenient.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user replies with booking facts.

items.hook: That kind of concern is totally understandable.
items.bridge: With sensitive skin, people usually feel better when the next step starts with understanding the current state, not with a hard push.
items.next_step: Acknowledge the concern and ask for a light description of the current condition plus the preferred booking window.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user shares current skin state and time.

items.hook: We can keep this simple and work from your time window first.
items.bridge: When the event is close, the date and available slot matter more than a generic treatment pitch.
items.next_step: Ask when the event is and what day or time the user can come in.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher once the user shares event timing.

items.hook: I can help make the price answer more useful.
items.bridge: Beauty pricing usually depends on whether you are trying to solve blackheads, sensitivity, a before-event need, or something else.
items.next_step: Ask one low-friction scope question before sharing the next step.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user shares concern scope.

items.hook: Glad you came back to this.
items.bridge: For returning salon guests, it helps to start from what changed since the last time instead of treating it like a first contact.
items.next_step: Ask what they most want to improve this time and when they hope to come in.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to FollowUp or Catcher depending on the user's reply.

items.bridge: Some beauty concerns feel personal, so the goal is to stay helpful without making the user feel exposed.
items.next_step: Reply with empathy and lightly invite the user to share timing or concern details in a less exposed way.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user continues with details.
